subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto my Beloved Who, through the word "Nay", hath caused all manifestations of negation to perish, and through the blessed word "but" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوبی راست که بکلمه لا جمیع مظاهر نفی را فانی فرمود و بکلمه مبارکه الا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @words vs deeds, @love of God
